summary: Iteration 54 - Extended Notifications System Testing. All 9 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend NotificationCenter component tested successfully - bell icon, unread badge, dropdown, notification items with correct icons (MapPin for new_parcel_to_verify, AlertTriangle for ssrte_critical_alert), mark-all-read functionality all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/cooperative/members/{member_id}/parcels correctly triggers new_parcel_to_verify notification stored in notification_history
PUT /api/cooperative/parcels/{parcel_id}/verify correctly triggers parcel_verified notification for the farmer (stored in notification_history with farmer's user_id)
POST /api/ssrte/visits/create with children_at_risk > 0 correctly triggers ssrte_critical_alert notification for the cooperative
POST /api/cooperative/carbon-premiums/pay correctly triggers payment_received notification for the farmer (requires approved carbon audit)
GET /api/notifications/history returns notifications sorted by created_at descending (newest first)
PUT /api/notifications/history/read-all correctly marks all notifications as read and returns {success: true, updated: count}

Frontend NotificationCenter displays correct icons: MapPin (blue) for new_parcel_to_verify, Check (green) for parcel_verified, AlertTriangle (red) for ssrte_critical_alert, Leaf (emerald) for payment_received
Frontend dropdown shows 'Tout lire' button when unread notifications exist
Frontend unread badge shows correct count with pulse animation
seed_data_creation: Created test parcels and SSRTE visits during testing to trigger notifications
context_for_next_testing_agent: Extended notification system is fully functional. Notification triggers work for: (1) new_parcel_to_verify when parcel created, (2) parcel_verified when parcel verified (sent to farmer), (3) ssrte_critical_alert when SSRTE visit has children_at_risk > 0 (sent to cooperative), (4) payment_received when carbon premium paid (sent to farmer, requires approved audit). Frontend NotificationCenter correctly displays all notification types with appropriate icons.

mocked_api_note.Expo Push Notifications: MOCKED (notifications stored in DB, push delivery simulated)

notifications_sorted_by_date.GET /api/notifications/history: PASS - Notifications returned in descending order by created_at

notification_center_component.icon_new_parcel_to_verify: PASS - MapPin icon (text-blue-500) displayed for new_parcel_to_verify type
notification_center_component.icon_ssrte_critical_alert: PASS - AlertTriangle icon (text-red-500) displayed for ssrte_critical_alert type
notification_center_component.notification_content: PASS - Shows title, body, and relative time (e.g., 'il y a 1min')

parcel_verified.status: WORKING (notification sent to farmer, not visible in cooperative's history)
